mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user (PK_USER, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, SEX, DEPARTMENT, IS_SYS, IS_LOCK, PK_CREATEDBY, DT_CREATED, PK_MODIFIEDBY, DT_MODIFIED, DS, VERSION, BLOB_HEADER) VALUES
(#{item.pkUser}, #{item.userName}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.sex}, #{item.department}, #{item.isSys}, #{item.isLock}, #{item.pkCreatedby}, #{item.dtCreated}, #{item.pkModifiedby}, #{item.dtModified}, #{item.ds}, #{item.version}, #{item.blobHeader})
